chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-12 of 2024 Crl. Transfer Application No.S-13 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 19-01-2024 Mr. Shamsuddin N. Kobhar, Advocate for applicant in both matters. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** These Crl. Transfer Applications for transfer of Crl. Appeals No. 15 & 16 of 2023 arising out of crime No.153 of 2022 and crime No.173 of 2023, registered at P.S, Mirpur Mathelo under section 489-F PPC respectively have been filed on a single ground: Appellate Court is lying vacant after retirement of learned Presiding Officer. Learned Additional P.G has, therefore, recorded no objection. Accordingly, both transfer applications are allowed and the subject Crl. Appeals are withdrawn from the file of Additional Sessions Judge-I, Mirpur Mathelo and transferred to the Court of Additional Sessions Judge-II, Mirpur Mathelo for disposal in accordance with law. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad
